tasks.subject: Task 0: Extract seatModel pure seam; wrap playerCardModel
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add seatModel(player, opts) to red-carpet.js (unified per-seat model for classic + team mode) and rewrite playerCardModel as a thin wrapper. Output of playerCardModel byte-identical for every input.

**Files:**
- Modify: public/js/ui/red-carpet.js (add seatModel ~30 LOC; refactor playerCardModel to wrap it)
- Create: client-tests/seat-builder.test.js (~10 pure-seam tests)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- seatModel({mode:'classic', slot:N}) returns accentHue == SEAT_HUES[N], no team key
- seatModel({mode:'team', team:'red'|'blue'}) returns team key set, no accentHue, no hasPickedColor
- seatModel ignores stableId (sentinel-tested both modes)
- playerCardModel(p, opts) === seatModel(p, {...opts, mode:'classic'}) for all real (player, opts) pairs (wrapper-equivalence sentinel)
- All pre-existing tests in red-carpet.test.js, red-carpet-render.test.js, red-carpet-seat-table.test.js, render-lobby.test.js stay GREEN without edits
- seat-builder.test.js has >=6 test cases, all green

**Verify:** `npx jest client-tests/seat-builder.test.js client-tests/red-carpet.test.js client-tests/red-carpet-render.test.js client-tests/red-carpet-seat-table.test.js client-tests/render-lobby.test.js --verbose` → all pass. Then `npm test --silent` → ~546 green.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["public/js/ui/red-carpet.js", "client-tests/seat-builder.test.js"], "verifyCommand": "npx jest client-tests/seat-builder.test.js client-tests/red-carpet.test.js client-tests/red-carpet-render.test.js client-tests/red-carpet-seat-table.test.js client-tests/render-lobby.test.js --verbose", "acceptanceCriteria": ["seatModel classic: accentHue == SEAT_HUES[slot], no team", "seatModel team: team key set, no accentHue", "stableId sentinel: ignored in both modes", "playerCardModel wrapper-equivalence", "All pre-existing pinned-green tests stay green without edits", "seat-builder.test.js >=6 tests green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: DOM builder + render rewrite + team-screen HTML + socket handlers
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add public/js/ui/ui-seat.js (buildSeatNode + buildEmptySeatNode), refactor renderLobby to call it (byte-identical), rewrite renderTeamScreen end-to-end, update index.html #team-screen body, extend socketClient.js change-handlers to team-suffixed ids.

**Files:**
- Create: public/js/ui/ui-seat.js (~150 LOC)
- Create: client-tests/render-team-screen.test.js (~11 tests)
- Modify: public/js/ui/ui-render.js (renderLobby seat-build → buildSeatNode; extract buildAddBotRow; renderTeamScreen full rewrite)
- Modify: public/js/socketClient.js (extend 3 ledger change-handler registrations to team-suffixed ids)
- Modify: public/index.html (#team-screen body rewrite to 3-column theater shape)
- Modify: client-tests/socket-handlers.test.js (add 3 tests for team-suffixed handlers)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- buildSeatNode(classicModel, ...) produces byte-identical DOM (regression proof: render-lobby.test.js + red-carpet-seat-table.test.js stay green)
- buildSeatNode(teamModel, ...) produces <li class='seat occupied team-red|team-blue'> with --seat-team-color, no swatches, no --avatar-hue
- renderLobby after refactor: classic-lobby tests byte-identical and green
- renderTeamScreen builds 3-col body, per-team seats, syncs team-suffixed ledger, gates Start Match
- Change events on team-suffixed ledger ids emit updateLobbySettings with same payload as classic
- All existing #team-screen ids preserved
- render-team-screen.test.js >=8 tests green; 3 new socket-handler tests green

**Verify:** `npm test --silent` → ~560 green; zero pre-existing tests edited.

**Critical pre-step:** Read existing SEAT_CHAIR_SVG in ui-render.js and copy verbatim into ui-seat.js. Read existing classic ledger change-handler registrations in socketClient.js and copy emit-payload shape verbatim when extending.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["public/js/ui/ui-seat.js", "public/js/ui/ui-render.js", "public/js/socketClient.js", "public/index.html", "client-tests/render-team-screen.test.js", "client-tests/socket-handlers.test.js"], "verifyCommand": "npm test --silent", "acceptanceCriteria": ["buildSeatNode produces byte-identical classic DOM (regression proof)", "buildSeatNode team mode: .seat.team-red/.team-blue + --seat-team-color, no swatches", "renderTeamScreen builds 3-col body + team seats + ledger sync + Start Match gating", "Team-suffixed change handlers emit updateLobbySettings with same payload as classic", "All #team-screen ids preserved", "render-team-screen.test.js >=8 tests green; 3 new socket-handler tests green", "Zero pre-existing tests edited"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: CSS append — team theater 3-col layout + team-color overrides
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Append a new 'Phase 7.8b — Team Theater Lobby' section to 02-hero-lobby.css. New higher-specificity rules scoped to .team-theater .seat.team-red/.team-blue override seat color properties via --seat-team-color. Zero edits to pre-existing rules.

**Files:**
- Modify: public/css/02-hero-lobby.css (append ~120-180 LOC under new section banner; zero edits to existing rules)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- No edits to pre-existing rules (git diff shows only insertions)
- .team-lobby-body 3-col grid at >=1000px; stacks <1000px; seats 2-col <640px
- Team seats use --seat-team-color for avatar/nameplate/spotlight
- Classic seats unaffected
- No new color tokens (reuses --team-red family from 01-base.css)
- npm test --silent still green (test count unchanged from T1)

**Verify:** `npm test --silent && git diff --stat public/css/02-hero-lobby.css` → tests green; insertions > 0, deletions == 0.

**Implementation note (decide at runtime):** If existing chair SVG uses url(#velvet) gradient stops referencing hsl(var(--avatar-hue),...), the cleanest override may need a second SVG variant in ui-seat.js (flat fill) instead of CSS !important. ASK USER BEFORE editing the gradient definition (would violate append-only). Plan §Task 2 Step 2 documents both paths.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["public/css/02-hero-lobby.css"], "verifyCommand": "npm test --silent && git diff --stat public/css/02-hero-lobby.css", "acceptanceCriteria": ["No edits to pre-existing rules (git diff shows only insertions)", ".team-lobby-body 3-col grid at >=1000px; stacks <1000px; seats 2-col <640px", "Team seats use --seat-team-color for avatar/nameplate/spotlight", "Classic seats unaffected", "No new color tokens", "Suite still green (test count unchanged)"]}
```
